conservative.name: Shelter of Rhya
conservative.requirements:
6 favour.
There must be ample natural vegetation within close range

success.description: You grow and shape the nearby flora to create a natural shelter from the elements. The shelter can fit about half a dozen average-sized people comfortably and requires a Hard Observation (3d) check to detect from outside. The shelter lasts until sunrise

sigmarsComet.description: The shelter requires a Hard Observation (3d) check to detect and confers to recovery checks made by those resting within

reckless.name: Wall of Taal
reckless.requirements:
6 favour.
There must be ample natural vegetation within close range

success.description: You grow and shape the nearby flora to create a natural wall of thorny, tough plants. The wall can be shaped into a circle blocking any exit. The wall requires a Hard Observation (3d) check (or comparable) to break through, and anyone attempting and failing suffers 1 wound. The wall disappears when this blessing has recharged

sigmarsComet.description: The wall is requires a Daunting (3d) Athletics check to break through and checks to break through it gain " Suffer 1 fatigue"
